regions.text: Our bodies govern themselves, but we also need conscious control. Education helps a person govern themselves as they grow.
As population grows, complex facts require machines for measuring and counting. (Diagram: A large 'ELECTRIC BRAIN' computer).
Can machines think? They can answer questions if we have built the power to do so into them.
education: the process of learning to be more able and responsible. (Introductory concept of computing and AI).
